instructions: Choose the best answer for each question. You have 15 minutes to complete this section.

items.text: All managers attend the leadership workshop. Priya is a manager. What can be concluded?
If it rains, the outdoor event is cancelled. The outdoor event was not cancelled. What can you conclude?
Which number comes next in the series: 2, 6, 18, 54, ___?
A is taller than B. C is shorter than B. D is taller than A. Who is the shortest?
Statement: 'No scientists are politicians. Some politicians are lawyers.' Which conclusion follows?
In a code language, CLOUD is written as DMPVE. How is STORM written?
Five friends sit in a row. M is to the left of N but to the right of O. P is to the right of N. Q is at the left end. What is the order from left to right?
If 'APPLE' = 50 and 'BANANA' = 42, what does 'CHERRY' = ? (A=1, B=2, ... Z=26)
A cube is painted red on all faces and then cut into 27 equal smaller cubes. How many smaller cubes have exactly two faces painted?
Pointing to a man, a woman says: 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the woman related to the man?
If P → Q and Q → R are true, and R is false, which must be true?
options: Q may or may not be true

items.text: A farmer has chickens and cows. There are 30 heads and 80 legs total. How many chickens are there?

Which figure completes the pattern? In a 3×3 grid, each row has a circle, a triangle, and a square. Each row has red, blue, and green. Row 3 has a green circle and a red triangle. What is the missing shape and colour?
Three switches outside a room each control one of three bulbs inside. You can enter the room only once. How do you determine which switch controls which bulb?
options: Turn all switches on and off quickly, then check brightness
Turn switch 1 on for 5 minutes, turn it off, turn switch 2 on, then enter and check heat and light
You cannot determine this with only one entry
Turn switches on one at a time and peek through the keyhole

items.text: In a tournament, every team plays every other team exactly once. If there are 8 teams, how many matches are played in total?
